chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3759 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 31.01.2018. Petitioners are present in person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith P.I Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Najamdin Koondhar on behalf of S.H.O Qasimabad, Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad and SIP Ali Asghar Chang / I.O of Crime No.44 of 2017 of P.S Cantt. Sukkur. Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner and Ms Shahida Tabassum Rana, Advocate, has also filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.9; taken on record. Learned A.A.G has filed comments of respondents No.3,4,5 and 7; taken on record and copies whereof supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. Petitioners are present and submit that they have contracted marriage out of their own freewill and choice but the relatives of petitioner No.1 have turned against them on account of such marriage and as a result thereof respondent No.9 Saif-ur-Rehman, the uncle of petitioner No.1, has lodged F.I.R. bearing Crime No.44 of 2017 at P.S Cantt., Sukkur, alleging abduction of petitioner No.1 at the hands of petitioner No.2 and others. Petitioners have shown serious apprehension to their lives and liberty. The private respondents and the official respondents are present and submit that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so in future. Parties present in court seek disposal of this petition if directions are given to the official respondents to provide protection of the lives and liberty of the petitioner.

The private respondents and the official respondents are present and submit that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so in future. Parties present in court seek disposal of this petition if directions are given to the official respondents to provide protection of the lives and liberty of the petitioner. The I.O of the case is present in court and he is directed to record the statement of petitioner No.1 being star witness of the case in the office of learned A.A.G and the copy whereof be submitted before the concerned court alongwith report for passing appropriate orders. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioners in violation of law and no arrest shall be made of the persons nominated in F.I.R. bearing crime No.44/2017 of P.S Cantt., Sukkur till passing of the order by the concerned court. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
